commercial_general_liability: Alternate Names: Liability Coverage, Liability Insurance. Description: Covers a business’s liability for third-party bodily injury, property damage, and personal and advertising injury arising from premises, operations, products, or completed work.
commercial_property: Alternate Names: Building and Property Coverage, Property Damage Insurance. Description: Covers physical business assets such as buildings and business personal property against covered causes of loss, subject to perils, limits, deductibles, and extensions.
workers_compensation: Alternate Names: Provisional worker Compensation, Statutory Employee Injury Insurance. Description: Provides legally mandated benefits to employees for work-related injuries or illnesses, including medical expenses, wage replacement, rehabilitation, disability, and employer’s liability protection.
EPLI: Full Form: Employment Practices Liability Insurance (EPLI). Alternate Names: Employment Liability, Management Liability Coverage. Description: Covers claims arising from employment-related acts such as discrimination, harassment, wrongful termination, retaliation, and failure to employ or promote. Also includes wrongful employment acts definitions, EEOC or equivalent proceedings, defense costs provisions, and wage and hour coverage often limited or endorsed.
homeowners: Alternate Names: Home/House Insurance. Description: Covers home, contents, personal liability, and additional living expenses.
personal_auto: Alternate Names: Personal Auto, Private Automobile, PAP. Description: Covers automobiles owned or leased by individuals for personal, non-business use. Compulsory coverages for this vary by state/province
cyber_liability: Alternate Names: Network Security & Privacy, Data Breach Insurance. Description: Covers cyber incidents including data breaches, ransomware, network security failures, privacy liability, and incident response costs, including first- and third-party losses.
umbrella_liabilities: Alternate Names: Excess Liability Coverage. Description: Provides additional liability limits above underlying policies such as General Liability, Auto Liability, or Employers Liability; umbrella policies may also broaden coverage where primary insurance does not apply.
commercial_auto: Alternate Names: Commercial Auto, Fleet Insurance. Description: Covers liability and physical damage for vehicles owned, leased, hired, or non-owned by a business.
inland_marine: Alternate Names: Equipment Floater, Commercial Inland Marine. Description: Covers contractor’s equipment and property, movable, specialized, or high-value property that may be off-premises, in transit, or at multiple locations.
directors_&_officers_liability: Alternate Names: D&O, Management Liability Insurance. Description: Protects directors and officers against claims alleging mismanagement, breach of fiduciary duty, errors in governance, or misleading statements; typically written on a claims-made basis. Also Includes Side A, Side B, and Side C coverage, claims-made trigger, wrongful acts definitions, and exclusions for bodily injury and property damage.
professional_liability: Alternate Names: Errors and Omissions (E&O), Malpractice Insurance. Description: Covers claims alleging negligence, errors, omissions, or failure to perform professional services as expected; typically claims-made with a retroactive date.
commercial_crime: Alternate Names: Fidelity Insurance, Crime Coverage. Description: Covers financial losses caused by employee dishonesty, theft, forgery, funds transfer fraud, and certain computer-related crimes.
surety_bond: Alternate Names: License & Permit Bonds, Contract Bonds. Description: Guarantees the performance, obligation, or compliance of one party to another, ensuring contractual or legal requirements are met; the surety pays the obligee if the principal fails and then seeks reimbursement from the principal.
dwelling_fire: Alternate Names: Landlord Insurance, Rental Property Insurance. Description: protects the physical structure of a property, like a rental home, vacation house, or vacant building, against specific perils such as fire, lightning, explosions, and vandalism, focusing on the building (walls, roof, foundation) rather than a standard homeowner's policy that covers personal belongings too
garage_auto_dealers: Alternate Names: Garage Liability, Auto Dealers Coverage, Garagekeepers. Description: Covers auto dealers, repair shops, and service operations for liability arising from premises, operations, and auto-related exposures, including customer vehicles in care, custody, or control.
excess_liability: Alternate Names: Follow-Form Excess Liability. Description: Provides higher liability limits above underlying policies without expanding coverage beyond the terms of the primary insurance; coverage strictly follows the underlying policy form. When & Where Used: Used by businesses seeking higher limits without umbrella enhancements.
